name: clagentic-lite
description: Marketplace for plugins shipped alongside clagentic-lite. Installs the four AI role agents (builder, reviewer, auditor, merge-gate) globally so Claude Code discovers them in any enrolled project without per-repo file copies.

plugins.name: clagentic-lite-agents
plugins.description: The four clagentic-lite role agents: builder (primary code author), reviewer (cross-vendor code review), auditor (security gates), merge-gate (final pre-merge sanity check). Installed globally via clagentic-lite init; updated via clagentic-lite update.
